2603.18623.title: OpenT2M: No-frill Motion Generation with Open-source,Large-scale, High-quality Data
2603.18623.paper_summary: Text-to-motion (T2M) generation aims to create realistic human movements from text descriptions, with promising applications in animation and robotics. Despite recent progress, current T2M models perform poorly on unseen text descriptions due to the small scale and limited diversity of existing motion datasets. To address this problem, we introduce OpenT2M, a million-level, high-quality, and open-source motion dataset containing over 2800 hours of human motion. Each sequence undergoes rigorous quality control through physical feasibility validation and multi-granularity filtering, with detailed second-wise text annotations. We also develop an automated pipeline for creating long-horizon sequences, enabling complex motion generation. Building upon OpenT2M, we introduce MonoFrill, a pretrained motion model that achieves compelling T2M results without complicated designs or technique tricks as "frills". Its core component is 2D-PRQ, a novel motion tokenizer that captures spatiotemporal dependencies by dividing the human body into biology parts. Experiments show that OpenT2M significantly improves generalization of existing T2M models, while 2D-PRQ achieves superior reconstruction and strong zero-shot performance. We expect OpenT2M and MonoFrill will advance the T2M field by addressing longstanding data quality and benchmarking challenges.
2603.18623.paper_summary_zh: 文本到運動（T2M）生成旨在從文本描述中創造現實的人類動作，並在動畫和機器人領域具有良好的應用前景。儘管最近取得了一定進展，但目前的 T2M 模型在未見過的文本描述上表現不佳，這是由於現有動作數據集的規模小且多樣性有限。為了解決這個問題，我們推出了 OpenT2M，一個百萬級、高品質且開源的動作數據集，包含超過 2800 小時的人類動作。每個序列都經過嚴格的質量控制，包括物理可行性驗證和多層次過濾，並附有詳細的逐秒文本註釋。我們還開發了一個自動化管道，用於創建長期序列，從而實現複雜的動作生成。在 OpenT2M 的基礎上，我們推出了 MonoFrill，一個預訓練的動作模型，能在沒有複雜設計或技術技巧作為“附加物”的情況下實現引人注目的 T2M 結果。其核心組件是 2D-PRQ，一種新型的動作標記器，通過將人體劃分為生物部件來捕捉時空依賴性。實驗表明，OpenT2M 顯著提高了現有 T2M 模型的泛化能力，而 2D-PRQ 則實現了卓越的重建效果和強大的零樣本性能。我們期望 OpenT2M 和 MonoFrill 能夠通過解決長期存在的數據質量和基準挑戰，推進 T2M 領域的發展。
2603.18623.author: Bin Cao et.al.
2603.18623.authors: Bin Cao, Sipeng Zheng, Hao Luo, Boyuan Li, Jing Liu, Zongqing Lu
